cross_dataset_eval.note: CIC cross-dataset metrics improved after source-IP holdout retraining and calibration.

cross_eval_cicids2018_all_days.note: Aggregated evaluation across all CICIDS2018 days remains weak, with strong day-to-day variance and poor recall on several days.

allowed: Strong in-dataset performance on CICIDS2018 test split.
Moderate generalization to unseen CICIDS2018 days (holdout).
Cross-dataset performance on CIC (cic.csv) improved after retraining.
not_allowed: No claim of robust performance across all CICIDS2018 days.
No claim of production readiness for arbitrary client environments without client traffic validation.

production_release_gate.reason: Despite improved CIC cross-dataset metrics, all-days CICIDS2018 evaluation remains weak and inconsistent; client traffic validation is still required.
